title: Carolina Maria Oletto
text:
I am a postdoctoral researcher at the Faculty of Health Sciences, University of Southern Denmark, Odense, Denmark.
My research interests include visual perception in the periphery of the visual field, in both general and clinical populations.
In my free time, I count kernel panics and reinstall operating systems—often in that order.
